context_text: <B> and that was really spooky because i got to my appointment and uh the person with whom i had the appointment did you hear anything on the news and i said yes i heard all of it and i related to this person / <A> yeah / <B> and i told told them that it sounded just like a bad science fiction novel that i had read / <A> uh-huh / <B> and i had at the time when i lived in denver my tv room was partially under ground so i / <A> no / <B> couldn't any broadcast tv { and i } / <A> [ ooh ] / <B> didn't have cable i didn't have dish / <A> okay / <B> so i really couldn't get tv / <A> oh
